title: Decoding the Delta: Unifying Remote Sensing Change Detection and Understanding with Multimodal Large Language Models

methodology.type: MLLM framework for multi-temporal remote sensing interpretation

innovations.name: Change-Enhanced Attention module
innovations.description: Systematically isolates and amplifies visual differences

innovations.name: Change-SEG module
innovations.description: Utilizes Change Prior Embedding to extract differentiable difference features as input for the LLM

cognitive_dimensions: Four progressive cognitive dimensions for change interpretation

results.performance: Delta-LLaVA outperforms leading generalist MLLMs and specialized segmentation models
